runs.brief_en: Early June 22 (Taipei): Musk marked Father's Day with family posts, pushed UK grooming-gang/media-coverage critiques (RT + 💯), demoed Grok Imagine, quoted skepticism on puberty blockers vs social-media age rules, boosted a California Starlink launch, and shared lighter video and history takes.
runs.brief_zh: 台北6/22凌晨：馬斯克父親節發文、轉推並認同英國性侵醜聞與媒體雙標評論、展示Grok Imagine、質疑青春期阻斷與社群年齡規定矛盾、轉推加州Starlink發射，並分享影片與歷史趣談。

runs.brief_en: Elon amplified UK grooming gangs and media double standards (retweeted Darth Powell, replied 💯 to rape gangs post, shared related video on Islamist threats), posted Grok Imagine dancing kittens video, said AI will exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years, demanded 'Execute them' in UK baby murder case, called Ro Khanna an 'evil liar' over tax proposals, endorsed 'McCarthy was right' on stripping terrorists' citizenship, joked 'Full access' on vibecoding, retweeted Starlink launch, shared Father's Day tributes and history replies.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克放大英國 grooming 團伙與媒體雙重標準（轉推 Darth Powell、💯 回覆強暴團伙貼文、分享相關伊斯蘭威脅影片），貼出 Grok Imagine 跳舞小貓影片，稱 AI 4-5 年內將超越全人類智慧，要求處決英國虐兒兇手，痛批 Ro Khanna 為「邪惡騙子」，認同「麥卡錫沒錯」剝奪恐怖分子公民權，幽默評「完全存取權」vibecoding，轉推 Starlink 發射、分享父親節致敬與歷史回覆。

runs.brief_en: Elon spent Father's Day amplifying UK grooming/media critiques, demanding 'Execute them' in a horrific baby case, predicting AI beats all human intelligence in 4-5 years, blasting Ro Khanna and endorsing 'McCarthy was right,' while demoing Grok Imagine. Silent since early morning. Tesla quoted FSD praise; SpaceX launched Starlink from California.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克父親節放大英國醜聞與媒體雙標、要求處決虐嬰兇手、稱AI四五年超越人類智慧、批Khanna與麥卡錫議題，展示Grok；凌晨後沉寂。Tesla轉推FSD好評。

runs.brief_en: Elon Musk on X in the last 12h: Vibecoding full access meme (quote → @kanavtwt); Ro Khanna tax criticism (reply → @WesternLensman); Immigrant America complaint video (reply → @miatalias); McCarthyism citizenship revocation (reply → @Rothmus); Socialists Latin America fail (reply → @EndWokeness)

Elon Musk on X in the last 12h: Vibecoding meme reaction (quote → @kanavtwt); Ro Khanna tax proposal criticism (reply → @WesternLensman); McCarthyism historical defense (reply → @Rothmus); China renewable energy growth (repost → @Rothmus); Immigration cultural critique (reply → @miatalias)

Elon Musk criticized Ro Khanna as 'evil liar' and said 'Time to sue this liar' over DOGE cuts claims. He quoted a vibecoding meme, defended McCarthy, commented on immigration and socialism, and posted a video amplifying warnings on Islam and Western immigration. Earlier: AI may exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years; UK crime cases highlighted.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克今日痛批羅·康納為「邪惡騙子」並稱「該起訴」其DOGE言論；引用vibecoding迷因、支持麥卡錫觀點、評移民與社會主義，並發影片警示伊斯蘭與西方移民。稍早預測AI 4-5年內超越人類智慧總和，關注英國犯罪案件。

items_flat.summary_en: Musk quote-posted a meme about 'Day 1 of vibecoding' with the reply '“Full access” 😂'. The post received massive engagement.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克引用 @kanavtwt 關於「vibecoding第一天」的迷因貼文，回覆「Full access」並附大笑表情，獲得大量互動。

items_flat.title_en: Ro Khanna criticism escalates: 'evil liar' on tax proposal and 'Time to sue this liar' over DOGE cuts
items_flat.title_zh: 羅·康納批評升級：稅務提案「邪惡騙子」及DOGE削減兒童主張「該起訴這個騙子」
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'He’s such an evil liar' to criticism of Rep. Ro Khanna's tax proposal. Later, responding to a New York Post story where Khanna claimed Musk 'needs to answer' for 4.5M kids 'sentenced to death' over DOGE cuts, Musk posted 'Time to sue this liar'.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆稱羅·康納在稅務提案上「是個邪惡的騙子」。稍後針對紐約郵報報導康納指馬斯克需為DOGE削減導致450萬兒童「被判死刑」負責，馬斯克發文「該起訴這個騙子」。

items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'Seriously' to a post on immigration and cultural issues.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克針對移民與文化議題的貼文回覆「Seriously」。

items_flat.title_zh: 麥卡錫主義歷史辯護（回覆 @Rothmus）
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'McCarthy was right' defending historical McCarthyism.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回覆「McCarthy was right」，為歷史上的麥卡錫主義辯護。

items_flat.title_zh: 社會主義在拉丁美洲失敗（回覆 @EndWokeness）
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied '😂' to a post about socialists' failures in Latin America.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克針對社會主義在拉丁美洲失敗的貼文回覆「😂」。

items_flat.title_en: Musk amplifies UK grooming-gang and media double-standard critiques
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克放大英國grooming幫派與媒體雙重標準批評
items_flat.summary_en: Musk retweeted @VladTheInflator contrasting a single Edinburgh knife attack labeled terrorism with grooming gangs' industrialized abuse of ~250,000 British girls that authorities downplayed. He later replied '💯' to another post on the topic.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 @VladTheInflator，對比單一起愛丁堡持刀攻擊被標為恐怖主義，與grooming幫派工業化虐待約25萬英國女孩卻被當局淡化的事件。後續回覆「💯」表支持。

links.label: Related Elon Musk activity on X
Elon Musk video share on X

items_flat.title_en: Musk: 'Execute them' in horrific UK baby murder case
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：英國嬰兒謀殺案「處決他們」
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'Execute them' to a post on a British teacher couple convicted of murdering and severely sexually abusing their 1-year-old adopted son Preston, with evidence of prolonged torture that reports say media downplayed.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克針對英國教師夫婦被判謀殺並嚴重性虐待1歲養子Preston的案件回覆「Execute them」，該案有長期酷刑證據，報導指媒體淡化處理。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: AI will exceed the sum of all human intelligence in 4-5 years
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：AI將在4-5年內超越全人類智慧總和
items_flat.summary_en: Musk stated: 'AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.' The comment landed amid ongoing debate over rapid AI progress and xAI's trajectory.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克表示：「AI大概會在4或5年內超越全人類智慧的總和。」此言論正值AI快速進展與xAI軌跡的熱烈討論中。
items_flat.musk_quote: AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: AI大概會在4或5年內超越全人類智慧的總和

items_flat.title_en: Musk retweets Falcon 9 Starlink launch from California
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推Falcon 9從加州發射Starlink
items_flat.summary_en: SpaceX announced Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink satellites from California with video and photos. Musk retweeted without added commentary, amplifying the successful mission.
items_flat.summary_zh: SpaceX宣布Falcon 9從加州成功發射24顆Starlink衛星，並附影片與照片。馬斯克無附加評論轉推，放大此成功任務。

items_flat.title_en: Musk posts video amplifying concerns over Islam and mass immigration in the West
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克發佈影片放大對伊斯蘭與西方大規模移民的擔憂
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk posted a video highlighting claims that Islam is a hostile totalitarian political ideology and warning that mass immigration to the West acts as a 'Trojan Horse' that must be stopped. The post aligns with his recent focus on UK and European cultural and security issues and gained strong engagement.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克發佈一段影片，強調伊斯蘭被描述為敵對的極權政治意識形態，並警告西方大規模移民如同「特洛伊木馬」必須停止。此貼文與他近期關注英國及歐洲文化安全議題一致，並獲得強烈互動。

items_flat.title_zh: 中國再生能源成長（轉推 @Rothmus）
items_flat.summary_en: Musk reposted @Rothmus noting China added a Germany-sized low carbon electricity grid last year, with nearly 500 TWh more generation, almost all solar and wind.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克轉推 @Rothmus，指出中國去年新增相當於德國規模的低碳電網，新增近500 TWh發電量，幾乎全為太陽能與風能。
items_flat.musk_quote:
RT @Rothmus: China added a Germany-sized low carbon electricity grid last year. 

Nearly 500 TWh more generation, almost all solar and wind…

items_flat.title_zh: 書店反馬克思聲明（回覆 @Chesschick01）
items_flat.summary_en: Musk replied 'Nice' to a post about a bookstore's anti-Marx statement.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克針對書店反馬克思聲明的貼文回覆「Nice」。

elon_personal.summary_zh: 馬斯克引用 @kanavtwt 關於「vibecoding第一天」的迷因貼文，回覆「Full access」並附大笑表情，獲得大量互動。

spacex.title_zh: 馬斯克轉推Falcon 9從加州發射Starlink
spacex.summary_en: SpaceX announced Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink satellites from California with video and photos. Musk retweeted without added commentary, amplifying the successful mission.
spacex.summary_zh: SpaceX宣布Falcon 9從加州成功發射24顆Starlink衛星，並附影片與照片。馬斯克無附加評論轉推，放大此成功任務。

xai_x_platform.title_zh: 馬斯克：AI將在4-5年內超越全人類智慧總和
xai_x_platform.summary_en: Musk stated: 'AI probably exceeds the sum of all human intelligence in 4 or 5 years.' The comment landed amid ongoing debate over rapid AI progress and xAI's trajectory.

brief_en: Elon Musk criticized Ro Khanna as 'evil liar' and said 'Time to sue this liar' over DOGE cuts claims. He quoted a vibecoding meme, defended McCarthy, commented on immigration and socialism, and posted a video amplifying warnings on Islam and Western immigration. Earlier: AI may exceed all human intelligence in 4-5 years; UK crime cases highlighted.
brief_zh: 馬斯克今日痛批羅·康納為「邪惡騙子」並稱「該起訴」其DOGE言論；引用vibecoding迷因、支持麥卡錫觀點、評移民與社會主義，並發影片警示伊斯蘭與西方移民。稍早預測AI 4-5年內超越人類智慧總和，關注英國犯罪案件。
